entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An agricultural approach aimed at increasing productivity and resilience to climate change while reducing greenhouse gas emissions.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: The Indian state where the climate-smart agriculture project was implemented.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the lead organization carrying out the project.

entities.name: CCAFS
entities.description: CGIAR Research Program on Climate Change, Agriculture and Food Security, a financial supporter and execution partner.

entities.name: MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FORESTS & CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Government of India ministry that provided financial support for the project.

entities.name: INDIAN COUNCIL OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: National agricultural research system of India that provided financial support for the project.

entities.name: NABARD
entities.description: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development, a partner in the execution of the project.

entities.name: EPTRI
entities.description: Environment Protection Training and Research Institute, a partner in the execution of the project.

entities.name: PJTSAU
entities.description: Prof. Jayashankar Telangana State Agriculture University, a partner in the execution of the project.

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, GOVERNMENT OF TELANGANA
entities.description: State government department and partner in the execution of the project.

relationships.source: MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FORESTS & CLIMATE CHANGE
DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, GOVERNMENT OF TELANGANA
